summary: All 8 findings from external review #1 (berendt) have been correctly addressed: B-001 (path triggers), W-001 (digest guard), W-002 (printf fix), W-003 (prepare job in diagram), W-004 (ls|wc -l replacement), W-005/W-006 (documentation of intentional patterns), I-001 (required:false for optional inputs), I-002 (defense-in-depth comment). No new bugs introduced. Tests 13/13 pass (verify_build_images_refactor.sh), 33/33 pass (verify_composite_actions.sh). Workflow is 599 lines. Two new review pattern files correctly capture lessons learned.
title: Refactor build-images workflow into reusable components

tests_checklist.item: New Test 13 covers B-001 path trigger fix
Edge cases covered (empty digest, empty digest dir, missing source dir)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing CI script patterns (SPDX, set -euo pipefail, env var interface)

security_checklist.item: No shell injection vectors in printf/sh -c (W-002 fixed)
No secrets exposed in logs or process listings
Command outputs validated before downstream use (W-001 fixed)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible — mechanical fixes only
Path triggers cover all file dependencies (B-001 fixed)

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No speculative additions beyond review fixes

fail_fast_checklist.item: Empty digest fails with ::error:: before GITHUB_OUTPUT (W-001)
Empty digest dir fails with ::error:: before imagetools create
Required env vars validated with :? guards

defensive_checklist.item: All external inputs validated at script entry
Word-splitting behavior documented for controlled inputs (W-005)

suggested_improvements: Consider adding a validation step to supply-chain-attest that fails fast when scan-mode=sbom but image-digest or sbom-output-file are empty — currently GitHub Actions does not enforce required:false inputs at runtime, so a misconfigured caller would get cryptic downstream errors from anchore/sbom-action rather than a clear input validation message. Low priority since all current callers pass correct values.
next_steps: Merge PR — all blocking, warning, and info findings from external review #1 are resolved

review_pattern_checks.ci-workflow-path-triggers-must-cover-all: PASS — hack/ci-* and .github/actions/** added to both push and pull_request paths blocks (lines 18-19, 30-31). New test (Test 13) enforces this going forward.
review_pattern_checks.guard-command-outputs-before-downstream-: PASS — digest validated non-empty before writing to GITHUB_OUTPUT (ci-merge-manifest.sh:66-69). Pattern file updated with CC-0055 occurrence.
review_pattern_checks.unsanitized-shell-command-output-used-in: PASS — ls|wc -l replaced with bash array glob (ci-merge-manifest.sh:33-37), eliminating platform-dependent whitespace issues.
review_pattern_checks.prevent-shell-injection-in-sh-c-command-: PASS — printf format-string injection fixed by using for-loop with %s specifier (ci-merge-manifest.sh:54). Variables in bash -c passed via -e env flags in ci-run-unit-tests.sh.
review_pattern_checks.cross-reference-documentation-examples-a: PASS — docs/reference/build-images-workflow.md diagram updated to include prepare job (W-003).
review_pattern_checks.enforce-consistent-error-handling-patter: PASS — new Test 13 follows the same PASS/FAIL counter pattern as Tests 1-12.

B-001_path_triggers.evidence: build-images.yaml lines 18-19 and 30-31 add hack/ci-* and .github/actions/** to both push and pull_request paths blocks
B-001_path_triggers.test_coverage: Test 13 (test_path_triggers_include_extracted_components) verifies both patterns appear >= 2 times

W-001_empty_digest_guard.evidence: ci-merge-manifest.sh lines 66-69: if [[ -z "${digest}" ]]; then echo '::error::...'; exit 1; fi

W-002_printf_format_string.evidence: ci-merge-manifest.sh line 54: replaced printf "${IMAGE}@sha256:%s" with for-loop using printf '%s' "${IMAGE}@sha256:${d}"

W-003_prepare_job_in_diagram.evidence: docs/reference/build-images-workflow.md lines 268-270: diagram shows lint-dockerfiles and prepare as parallel root nodes

W-004_ls_wc_l_replacement.evidence: ci-merge-manifest.sh lines 33-37: shopt -s nullglob; files=(*); if [[ ${#files[@]} -eq 0 ]]

W-005_unquoted_variables_doc.evidence: ci-run-unit-tests.sh lines 59-62: comment documents intentional word splitting and safety justification

W-006_install_spec_guard_doc.evidence: ci-run-unit-tests.sh lines 30-32: comment documents :? guard sufficiency and upstream behavior

I-001_required_false.evidence: supply-chain-attest/action.yaml lines 20-27: image-digest and sbom-output-file changed to required:false with default:''

I-002_defense_in_depth_comment.evidence: build-images.yaml line 292: inline comment '# defense-in-depth: matrix already excludes ARM64 on PRs'
